problem: Tom had 20 marbles, but then lost 8. How many marbles does Tom have?

Gina had 10 books, but then gained 5. How many books does Gina have?
Hank had 30 tokens initially, but then gained 12. How many tokens does Hank have?
Iris had 22 gems, but gained 8. How many gems does Iris have?
Jake had 55 points initially, but then gained 20. How many points does Jake have?
Kim had 14 shells, but then got 6. How many shells does Kim have?
Leo had 40 tickets initially, but then received 15. How many tickets does Leo have?
Mia had 18 rings, but then found 7. How many rings does Mia have?
Ned had 35 coins, but then earned 10. How many coins does Ned have?
Pat had 10 toys, but then lost 20. How many toys does Pat have?
Quinn had 5 pens initially, but then gave 15. How many pens does Quinn have?

Tina had 80 beads initially, but gave away 33. How many beads does Tina have?
